message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor Client
participant "Service1" as S1
participant "Service2" as S2

note right of S1: SessionFactory\none per node
note right of S2: Session\none per request!

rectangle "model check" {
  Client -> S1 : register(Class<Pojo>)
  activate S1
  S1 -> S1 : checkModel
  S1 -> S1 : createModelForPojo
  
  alt mode="create"
    alt model exists
      S1 --> S1 : throw exception
    else
      S1 -> S1 : createModelInDB
    end
  else mode="drop-create"
    S1 -> S1 : dropModelInDB
    S1 -> S1 : createModelInDB
  else mode="update"
    S1 -> S1 : getModelDeltaInDB
    S1 -> S1 : updateModelInDB
  else mode="none"
    S1 -> S1 : checkModelInDB
    alt model differs
      S1 --> S1 : throw exception
    end
  end
  deactivate S1
}

Client -> S2 : store(pojo)
activate S2
S2 -> S2 : getDelta(pojo)
deactivate S2

@enduml
```
